title: The Lovable Cheat
writer: Edward Lewis, Richard Oswald, Honoré de Balzac
actors: Charles Ruggles, Peggy Ann Garner, Richard Ney
plot: A businessman and his partner are about to go bankrupt when the partner gets an idea to sail away and somehow find the money they need. Meanwhile, the one left behind has to figure out how to put off all the creditors, friends, fa...
